description: Canonical machine-readable catalog of Limina built-in skills. Each skill maps 1:1 to an MCP tool whose name IS the skill name; the tool input is validated against a JSON Schema (draft-07) derived from the skill's Zod schema. Generated from the real registry (js/src/skills/*) via tools/dump-skills.ts.

mcp.listTools: returns [{ name, description, input_schema, category, priority }] where input_schema is JSON Schema draft-07
mcp.callTool: { tool, input, context? } -> { success, result?, error?: { code, message }, metadata? }

skills.name: agent.emitEvent
skills.description: Emit a custom event into the observability trace (inter-agent or system signal).

skills.name: agent.getPerception
skills.description: Get the calling agent's current perception (nearby entities + recent events).

skills.name: animation.blend
skills.description: Blend two or more clips with weights (for locomotion: idle/walk/run). Weights are normalized across the set.

clips.description: Clips to blend between (weights are normalized).

skills.name: animation.createStateMachine
skills.description: Define an animation state machine for an entity: states (clips), conditional transitions, and animator parameters. Starts in the default state.

skills.name: animation.emote
skills.description: Play a one-shot emote/expressive animation (wave, point, nod) on a high-priority layer. Fails cleanly (ok:false) when the entity has no glTF object.

clipId.description: Emote clip id (registered via animation.load or carried by the glTF).

skills.name: animation.getClipInfo
skills.description: Get the current clip id, time, duration, weight, and layer for an entity's running actions (read from the live AnimationActions).

skills.name: animation.load
skills.description: Register an animation clip for use. With only metadata it registers a track-less clip the mixer will run; rigged clips come from the entity's glTF (resolved by name at play time) or a programmatic THREE.AnimationClip.

assetId.description: Source asset id (GLTF animation, etc.) for content-addressed loading.

skills.name: animation.play
skills.description: Play an animation clip on an entity's mixer with layer, weight, speed, and loop. Fails cleanly (ok:false) when the entity has no glTF object.

clipId.description: Clip id to play (registered via animation.load or carried by the entity's glTF).

skills.name: animation.setParam
skills.description: Set an animator parameter (bool, float, int, trigger) to drive state-machine transitions (evaluated on update).

skills.name: animation.stop
skills.description: Stop an animation on an entity (all layers or a specific layer) with optional fade-out.

layer.description: Stop only this layer. If omitted, stop all.

skills.name: animation.transition
skills.description: Force a state transition in an entity's animation state machine (crossfades to the target state's clip).

state.description: Target state name in the entity's animation state machine.

skills.name: approval.deny
skills.description: Reject a held agent action by id; it is dropped and never applied.

skills.name: approval.grant
skills.description: Approve a held agent action by id; it is applied now and its outcome returned.

skills.name: approval.list
skills.description: List agent actions currently held for human approval (id, skill, proposed input, agent).

skills.name: asset.place
skills.description: Place a curated glTF asset BY ID at a transform. Resolves the id through the content-addressed asset registry, loads it via the shared glTF pipeline, and spawns an entity. The world log records the REQUEST (assetId + transform + committed content hash); the bytes ride the registry/export package. Returns the entity id + content hash.

skills.name: asset.scatter
skills.description: Scatter curated glTF assets BY ID across an ALREADY-GENERATED region (by regionId) under an agent-set ScatterConfig (palette + density + elevation/slope/climate rules). Bound to the region's seed/lod + applied tiles, so placements sit on the visible, exported surface. Deterministic + replay-safe: the world log records the regionId + ScatterConfig REQUEST (+ pinned asset hashes), NEVER the instance transforms, which replay recomputes over the SAME baked/cached tiles. Mounts one InstancedMesh per asset mesh. Returns the placement count + pinned hashes.

skills.name: audio.ambient
skills.description: Start a looping synthesized ambience bed on a bus (default ambience). Returns an opaque handle.

skills.name: audio.play
skills.description: Play a one-shot synthesized SFX blip (sine + envelope) on a bus (master/sfx/ambience/voice). Returns an opaque handle.

skills.name: audio.playAt
skills.description: Play a one-shot POSITIONAL synthesized SFX at a world position; 3D-panned + attenuated relative to the camera listener. Optional maxDistance cutoff. Returns an opaque handle.

skills.name: audio.playBGM
skills.description: Schedule background music for the audio backend (looping, volume independent of the SFX bus). Stores the current-track config; the backend consumes it to play. Returns ok:false if the track id is not registered.

config.description: Custom BGM data (tempo, mood, transition, etc.).

skills.name: audio.playSFX
skills.description: Schedule a named sound effect from the SFX library for the audio backend. Returns a DETERMINISTIC handle (derived from the call tick + a monotone sequence) the backend uses to track/stop the instance; replay recomputes the same handle.

name.description: SFX name from the sound library.

config.description: Custom SFX data (pitch variation, randomization, etc.).

skills.name: audio.setBGM
skills.description: Schedule a crossfade from the current BGM to a new track over a duration. Stores the new current-track config; the backend consumes it to crossfade. Returns ok:false if the track id is not registered.

skills.name: audio.setBusVolume
skills.description: Set a mixer bus volume (master/sfx/ambience/voice), re-gaining all live sounds on it.

skills.name: audio.setReverb
skills.description: Register a reverb zone (configurable size, decay, damping) for an area. Stores the zone in the reverb manager; the audio backend applies it when the listener is inside. Returns a deterministic zone id.

skills.name: audio.setVolume
skills.description: Set a playing sound's volume (0..1) by handle.

skills.name: audio.speak
skills.description: Speak a line of text aloud at a world position via a pluggable local TTS voice (voice bus, positional). FIRE-AND-FORGET: returns immediately; synthesis runs off-thread and never blocks the frame. Returns an opaque handle.

skills.name: audio.stop
skills.description: Stop a playing sound by handle.

skills.name: audio.stopBGM
skills.description: Schedule a stop/fade-out of the current background music. Clears the stored current-track config; the backend consumes the event to fade out.

skills.name: audit.explain
skills.description: Answer 'why was action X allowed/denied': the governing policy decision (rule + reason + context + quota/budget), the provenance (agent/session/profile/package), and the causal-parent chain — all from the real recorded trace.

skills.name: audit.query
skills.description: Query recorded policy decisions: filter by allow/deny, cap, rule, agent, session, or package (package provenance). Returns matching decision events plus an allow/deny + by-rule + by-cap summary.

skills.name: audit.usage
skills.description: Resource usage from recorded decisions: allowed/denied call counts per session+cap, plus the latest quota and budget snapshots seen for each session — derived from the real policy events.

skills.name: behavior.assign
skills.description: Assign a behavior profile to an NPC entity.

skills.name: behavior.define
skills.description: Define a behavior profile: routines, reactions to events/triggers, and goals for an NPC type. Fully data-driven — agents define arbitrary behavior structures.

action.description: Action name (patrol, work, sleep, socialize, etc.).

trigger.description: Event name or condition that triggers this reaction.

skills.name: behavior.onEvent
skills.description: Attach a behavior reaction to a game event or trigger (on player nearby → approach, on damage → flee). The reaction descriptor is stored on the entity so the decision provider can query and fire it.

skills.name: behavior.setGoal
skills.description: Set an active goal for an NPC (patrol, follow, flee, guard, interact).

skills.name: camera.cut
skills.description: Instantly cut the camera to a new position and/or look-at target (cinematic transitions).

position.description: Camera position. If omitted, keeps current position.

target.description: Look-at target. If omitted, keeps current target.

skills.name: camera.firstPerson
skills.description: Set camera to first-person mode on an entity (head position + look rotation from camera.look).

skills.name: camera.follow
skills.description: Attach a camera to follow an entity with configurable distance, pitch, smoothness, and collision avoidance. Driven by the real third-person orbit rig.

collisionCheck.description: Whether to check for collisions between camera and target.

skills.name: camera.look
skills.description: Apply a look rotation (radians) to the active camera. Use with input look axes for mouse/touch control.

skills.name: camera.setFOV
skills.description: Set the camera's field of view (applied on the next update).

transitionMs.description: Smooth transition duration in ms (0 = instant).

skills.name: camera.shake
skills.description: Trigger a camera shake with configurable amplitude, duration (seconds), frequency, and fade. The shake envelope decays deterministically over its duration as update(dt) is pumped.

duration.description: Shake duration in seconds (matched against the update dt).

skills.name: camera.thirdPerson
skills.description: Set camera to third-person orbit mode (real ThirdPersonCamera rig) with configurable distance, initial pitch, and pitch/zoom limits.

skills.name: camera.topDown
skills.description: Set camera to top-down/isometric view with configurable angle and zoom.

angle.description: Camera angle from vertical (radians). 0 = straight down, PI/4 = isometric.

skills.name: checkpoint.create
skills.description: Create a named checkpoint of the CURRENT world state: every live entity's ECS transform (Position/Rotation/Scale, + body transform when body-bound), the entity-table identity, and the supplied serializable gameState. Restored by checkpoint.load. Does NOT capture native physics body internals or render meshes.

includeGameState.description: Whether to store the supplied gameState in the checkpoint.

includeEntityPositions.description: Whether to capture entity transforms + identity.

skills.name: checkpoint.delete
skills.description: Delete a named checkpoint.

skills.name: checkpoint.list
skills.description: List available checkpoints for the current session (name, tick, captured entity count).

skills.name: checkpoint.load
skills.description: Restore a named checkpoint: re-issue the entity-table identity, write every captured entity transform back into the world, and return the stored gameState for the caller to re-apply. Native physics bodies, meshes, and closure-bound managers are NOT restored (re-derive those by replaying their authoring skills).

skills.name: combat.defend
skills.description: Enter a defensive stance that reduces incoming damage on subsequent damage.apply until it expires. Duration is in seconds, converted to a deterministic tick-expiry window (ctx.tick + duration·60).

skills.name: combat.melee
skills.description: Perform a melee attack from an entity toward an explicit target. If targetEntity is omitted, no auto-target is performed and hit:false is returned. Crit (optional config.critChance) is derived deterministically from tick+ids (no RNG).

targetEntity.description: Target entity. If omitted, no auto-target is performed (returns hit:false).

config.description: Custom melee data (critChance 0-1, critMultiplier, hit sound, animation, etc.).

skills.name: combat.ranged
skills.description: Fire a ranged attack from an entity. IMPLEMENTATION: an honest IMMEDIATE HIT toward targetEntity via the same damage path as melee (no separate projectile entity); when only a direction is given there is no target to resolve, so it fires into space (hit:false). Crit (optional config.critChance) is deterministic from tick+ids.

direction.description: Projectile direction. If omitted, fires toward targetEntity.

config.description: Custom projectile data (critChance 0-1, critMultiplier, visual effect, etc.).

skills.name: damage.apply
skills.description: Apply damage to an entity. Respects the defense stat and any active defend stance. Returns damage dealt, remaining HP, and whether target was killed. Fires the target's onZero action on the killing blow.

config.description: Custom damage data (crit chance, armor penetration, etc.).

skills.name: damage.heal
skills.description: Apply healing to an entity (restores HP). Returns the ACTUAL clamped amount healed and the remaining HP.

skills.name: dev.reload
skills.description: Live-reload a skill (registry unregister+re-register so a later callTool runs the new handler) or re-run a registered scene builder; emits an honest dev.*.reload.completed/.failed trace event listing what was invalidated. Targets that genuinely cannot reload fail honestly instead of pretending success.

skills.name: dialogue.choose
skills.description: Make a choice in an active dialogue. Advances the tree to the next node.

skills.name: dialogue.define
skills.description: Define a dialogue tree: nodes with text, choices, conditions, and effects. Fully data-driven — agents author arbitrary dialogue structures.

mood.description: Dialogue mood (affects voice, animation, bubble styling).

condition.description: Condition expression for showing this choice.

effects.description: Effects to apply when this choice is selected.

nodes.description: Dialogue nodes with text, speaker, choices, and effects.

skills.name: dialogue.end
skills.description: End an active dialogue between two entities.

skills.name: dialogue.get
skills.description: Get the current state of an active dialogue (current node, available choices, history).

skills.name: dialogue.npcSay
skills.description: Have an NPC speak a line. Extends social.say with optional dialogue context and mood.

dialogueContext.description: Related dialogue tree or node id.

skills.name: dialogue.setMood
skills.description: Set the mood/tone for an NPC's dialogue. Affects voice, animation, and bubble styling.

mood.description: Mood/tone (happy, angry, sad, nervous, excited, etc.).

skills.name: dialogue.start
skills.description: Start a dialogue between two entities using a defined dialogue tree. Shows dialogue UI.

skills.name: ecs.addComponent
skills.description: Tag an entity with a named component (e.g. 'target', 'hostile').

skills.name: ecs.removeComponent
skills.description: Remove a named component tag from an entity.

skills.name: ecs.updateComponent
skills.description: Set an entity's position [x,y,z], rotation quaternion [x,y,z,w], or scale [x,y,z].

skills.name: event.emit
skills.description: Emit a named game event with arbitrary payload. DISPATCHES to every registered listener for that event, returning the matched listeners' action descriptors + a fired count. The bus is the WHEN; the host drives the returned descriptors via the agent's other skills (the WHAT).

payload.description: Event payload data forwarded to each listener.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: event.listen
skills.description: Register a listener for a named game event, storing an action descriptor to dispatch when it fires. Returns a listener handle; use event.remove to unregister.

data.description: Action-specific data (event name, spawn params, audio params, etc.).

action.description: Action descriptor to dispatch when the event fires.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: event.remove
skills.description: Remove a previously registered event listener.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: game.condition
skills.description: Define and/or evaluate a named condition (a SAFE boolean expression over game flags/counters/variables — no eval). Fires its onTrue event on the rising edge.

expression.description: Boolean expression: flag('n'), counter('n'), variable('n'), == != < <= > >=, && || ! and parens. Required for define.

onTrue.description: Event name to emit when the condition becomes true (rising edge).

skills.name: game.counter
skills.description: Get, set, increment, or decrement a named game counter.

value.description: Value for set action, or delta for increment/decrement.

skills.name: game.flag
skills.description: Get or set a boolean game flag (shorthand for commonly-checked conditions: bossDefeated, doorUnlocked, etc.).

value.description: Set the flag. If omitted, returns current value.

skills.name: game.lose
skills.description: Trigger the lose condition. Ends the game session with a failure state.

skills.name: game.restart
skills.description: Restart the current game session (reset game state to running, clearing run progress). Full world reset requires scene reload.

skills.name: game.state
skills.description: Get or set a named game state variable (string, number, bool, or JSON object).

skills.name: game.timer
skills.description: Start, pause, resume, query, or TICK named game timers. `tick` advances all timers by an explicit dt (deterministic — no wall-clock) and fires each completed timer's onComplete event. Supports countdown and countup.

dt.description: Seconds to advance all timers (for action=tick).

onComplete.description: Event name to emit when this timer completes.

skills.name: game.win
skills.description: Trigger the win condition. Ends the game session with a victory state.

skills.name: input.action
skills.description: Query whether a bound action is currently active (pressed/held). Reflects the latest native poll or input.set injection.

skills.name: input.axis
skills.description: Query a continuous axis value (e.g. moveX, moveY, lookX, lookY). Range is typically -1 to 1.

skills.name: input.bind
skills.description: Bind an action or axis name to input sources (keyboard keys, mouse buttons, gamepad axes). Query its state with input.action / input.axis; drive it from the native device (host poll) or inject it with input.set.

type.description: Whether this binding is discrete (action) or continuous (axis).

skills.name: input.set
skills.description: Inject the current state of a bound action (boolean) or axis (number) — scripted/agent-driven input. The host's per-frame native poll sets the same names from a real device.

value.description: State to inject: boolean for an action, number for an axis.

skills.name: inspector.snapshot
skills.description: Return a bounded, paginated snapshot of world, entities, agents, skills, permissions, resources, and trace metadata.

skills.name: interaction.close
skills.description: Close an open container entity.

skills.name: interaction.drop
skills.description: Drop an item from inventory into the world at the actor's position (or a specified position). Removes it from inventory and spawns a real world item entity, returning its id.

slot.description: Inventory slot. If omitted, drops first matching item.

position.description: Drop position. If omitted, uses actor's position.

skills.name: interaction.interact
skills.description: Perform an interaction with a target entity. Triggers the entity's registered interaction handler. Stamps the interaction tick from the sim tick (replay-deterministic).

actorEntity.description: Actor entity (defaults to calling agent's entity).

data.description: Custom interaction data (e.g. which item to use, which dialogue option).

skills.name: interaction.open
skills.description: Open a container entity. Plays open animation/state, enables container interaction.

entity.description: Container entity to open (chest, door, cabinet).

skills.name: interaction.pickup
skills.description: Pick up an item entity into an inventory slot. Destroys the world item entity. Requires an inventory on the actor.

slot.description: Target inventory slot index. If omitted, auto-assign.

skills.name: interaction.query
skills.description: Query interactable entities within range of a position (or the actor entity), sorted by distance. Uses the world spatial index over real entity transforms. Pure read — emits nothing.

position.description: Query position. If omitted, uses the actor entity's position (actorEntity).

actorEntity.description: Actor entity whose position to query from (used when position is omitted).

skills.name: interaction.register
skills.description: Register an entity as interactable with a prompt, max range, and type. Interactions trigger the entity's handler.

prompt.description: Interaction prompt text (e.g. 'Press E to pick up').

action.description: Custom action name or event to trigger on interaction.

skills.name: interaction.toggle
skills.description: Toggle an interactable entity between two states (on/off, open/closed, locked/unlocked).

skills.name: interaction.use
skills.description: Use/consume an item from inventory (eat food, drink potion, use key on door). Consumes the item from the actor's inventory; fails honestly if the actor lacks it.

targetEntity.description: Target entity for the use action (e.g. use key on door).

skills.name: inventory.add
skills.description: Add an item to an inventory by definition id. Stacks with existing items if stackable; rejects items whose category is not allowed by the inventory's type restrictions (reason: 'type-restricted').

slot.description: Target slot index. If omitted, auto-assign.

skills.name: inventory.count
skills.description: Count how many of a specific item are in an inventory (sums across all slots). Pure read.

skills.name: inventory.create
skills.description: Create an inventory on an entity with a slot capacity and optional type restrictions.

typeRestrictions.description: Optional item type restrictions (only allow items of these categories).

skills.name: inventory.has
skills.description: Check if an inventory contains a specific item (returns boolean). Pure read.

skills.name: inventory.list
skills.description: List all items in an inventory with slot positions and quantities, plus the equipped items by equipment slot. Pure read.

skills.name: inventory.remove
skills.description: Remove an item from an inventory by slot index or item id.

skills.name: inventory.transfer
skills.description: Transfer items between two inventories (entity-to-entity). Honours the destination's type restrictions and rolls back if the destination cannot take the items (true no-op on failure).

skills.name: item.define
skills.description: Define an item type with name, description, stackability, weight, category, usage behavior, and custom config data.

icon.description: Icon asset id or texture reference.

config.description: Custom item data (agent-defined: heal amount, damage value, quest trigger, etc.).

skills.name: item.equip
skills.description: Equip an item from the inventory into a named equipment slot (moves one unit out of the inventory slots into the equipment slot).

itemId.description: Item id (in the inventory) to equip.

skills.name: item.unequip
skills.description: Unequip the item in a named equipment slot back into the inventory (rolls back if there is no free inventory slot).

equipmentSlot.description: Equipment slot name to unequip back into the inventory.

skills.name: material.import
skills.description: Import a CC0 texture pack (albedo + optional normal + roughness images, BY content-addressed id) as a NAMED PBR material usable by scene.createEntity / three.setMaterial. Resolves + decodes the images through the content-addressed asset registry (bytes ride the export's assets.jsonl); the world log records only the import REQUEST (name + ids + committed hashes), never bytes. Optionally TRIPLANAR so the pack never UV-stretches on arbitrary primitives. Returns the name + pinned hashes.

skills.name: navmesh.build
skills.description: Build a WALKABLE GRID navmesh over a world-XZ region: rasterise obstacle AABBs / explicit blocked cells / a sampled height field (slope+elevation gating) into a cell grid that findPath/isReachable A* over. CPU grid baseline (no GPU/Rust) — deterministic and replay-safe; upgradeable to a polygon navmesh later. Returns the grid dimensions and walkable/blocked cell counts.

agentRadius.description: Inflate obstacles by this footprint radius.

heightField.description: Optional sampled height field for slope/elevation gating + waypoint Y.

maxSlope.description: Max walkable |Δh|/cellSize to an open neighbour.

skills.name: navmesh.findPath
skills.description: Find a path between two world positions with deterministic A* over the grid navmesh. Returns the waypoint list (endpoints exact, interior = walkable cell centres) and whether the goal is reachable. Empty path when there is no grid or no route — NO straight-line cheat.

skills.name: navmesh.isReachable
skills.description: Check (via real A* existence) whether a target is reachable from an entity's current position (body/tracked) or an explicit `from`. Returns false when there is no grid, an endpoint is blocked, or the cells are disconnected.

entity.description: Entity to check from (uses its body/tracked position). Ignored if `from` is given.

skills.name: navmesh.moveTo
skills.description: Advance an entity ONE deterministic step (speed·dt) along an A* path toward a target. Drives op_physics_move_character (kinematic CCT) when the entity has a character body; otherwise steps the ECS transform directly. (Re)plans via A* when the target cell changes. Deterministic — fixed dt (default 1/60), no wall-clock — so a replayed move sequence reaches the identical position. Fails cleanly (ok:false) when there is no grid or no route.

dt.description: Integration timestep in seconds (default 1/60). Deterministic — never wall-clock.

from.description: Seed position for the FIRST step (when the entity has no body and no tracked position).

skills.name: navmesh.setSpeed
skills.description: Set an entity's movement speed (world units/second) for subsequent navmesh.moveTo steps.

skills.name: npc.memorize
skills.description: Record a memory/fact for an NPC (saw player at X, heard sound at Y, likes/dislikes Z).

source.description: Source of the memory (entity id, event name, etc.).

skills.name: npc.recall
skills.description: Query an NPC's memories (for dialogue or behavior decisions).

key.description: Memory key to filter by. If omitted, returns all memories.

skills.name: npc.setAttitude
skills.description: Set an NPC's attitude toward another entity (friendly, neutral, hostile). Affects dialogue and behavior.

skills.name: npc.setRoutine
skills.description: Set a daily/hourly routine for an NPC (time-based position and activity schedule).

routineId.description: Routine id from a behavior profile.

skills.name: package.list
skills.description: List installed packages with their manifest provenance: ref (name@version), kind, declared capabilities, engine-compat range, content hash, and whether the package is attested.

skills.name: package.load
skills.description: Load an installed package (by name@version ref) under a profile: validates the manifest, checks engine-compat (out-of-bounds rejected), gates declared-vs-granted capabilities via the policy engine (over-claim denied), and loads the untrusted entry into the M6 sandbox. Returns the load decision + provenance event id.

skills.name: physics.applyImpulse
skills.description: Apply an impulse [x,y,z] to an entity's dynamic body (wakes it).

skills.name: physics.collisionEvents
skills.description: Drain physics collision start/stop events, mapped to entity ids where available.

skills.name: physics.raycast
skills.description: Cast a ray from origin along direction; returns the first hit (distance, point, entity).

skills.name: player.crouch
skills.description: Toggle crouch for a player entity. While on, player.move scales the move input down (a real, slower move) and the reported character height drops to the crouch height.

skills.name: player.jump
skills.description: Trigger a jump on the player's character controller — only takes effect when grounded. Sets the controller's upward velocity (fed through move_character + gravity), NOT a force impulse (a kinematic body ignores impulses). Advances one fixed step; returns whether it jumped + the new position.

skills.name: player.move
skills.description: Advance a player's character controller ONE fixed step from an input command (forward/strafe axes rotated by yaw), resolving collisions, slopes, autostep, snap-to-ground, and gravity. Sprint (player.sprint) raises the speed; crouch (player.crouch) lowers it. Returns the corrected position + grounded.

yaw.description: Movement heading (radians); rotates forward/strafe into world space.

run.description: Run this step (also implied while sprint is toggled on).

jump.description: Trigger a jump this step (on the rising edge while grounded).

skills.name: player.spawn
skills.description: Spawn a kinematic character-controller capsule (Rapier: grounded detection, slope limit, autostep, snap-to-ground, plus controller-integrated gravity + jump) at a position, register it as an entity, and return its entity id + body id. Drive it with player.move / player.jump.

position.description: Spawn position — the capsule CENTER. Rest height = surfaceY + halfHeight + radius.

halfHeight.description: Capsule cylindrical half-height (excludes the radius caps).

skills.name: player.sprint
skills.description: Toggle sprint for a player entity. While on, player.move runs the controller at run speed (a real, faster move) instead of walk speed.

skills.name: progression.allocate
skills.description: Allocate a progression point to a node in a skill tree. Enforces prerequisites and skill-point cost — a blocked allocation returns ok:false (no fake success).

skills.name: progression.isUnlocked
skills.description: Check if an ability, area, item, or skill is unlocked for an entity. Pure read — does not emit.

skills.name: progression.level
skills.description: Get an entity's current level and XP progress (computed from the XP curve). Pure read — does not emit.

skills.name: progression.onLevelUp
skills.description: Attach a data-driven action to execute when an entity levels up. The action is STORED and re-fired by progression.xp on every subsequent level gain.

action.description: Action to execute on level up (grant stat points, unlock abilities, etc.).

skills.name: progression.skillTree
skills.description: Define a skill/ability tree with prerequisites, costs, max levels, and effects. Fully data-driven.

prerequisites.description: Node ids that must be unlocked before this node.

maxLevel.description: Maximum allocation level for this node.

effects.description: Effects granted when this node is allocated (stat bonuses, abilities, etc.).

skills.name: progression.unlock
skills.description: Unlock an ability, area, item, or skill for an entity.

id.description: Ability, area, item, or skill id to unlock.

skills.name: progression.xp
skills.description: Grant XP to an entity. Auto-levels up when the XP threshold is reached and FIRES any attached onLevelUp actions (one progression.levelUp event per level gained).

skills.name: quest.accept
skills.description: Accept an offered quest (moves it from available to active).

skills.name: quest.complete
skills.description: Mark an active quest complete (only when its objectives are satisfied, or with force). Stamps completedTick from the current tick and records/emits its rewards and follow-up quests.

force.description: Complete even if objectives are unsatisfied (marks them complete).

skills.name: quest.decline
skills.description: Decline an offered quest (removes it from the quest log).

skills.name: quest.define
skills.description: Define a quest with name, description, objectives, prerequisites, rewards, and follow-up quests. Objectives support custom types via config.

prerequisites.description: Quest ids that must be completed before this quest is offered.

target.description: Target entity id, item id, location name, etc.

rewards.description: Quest rewards (items, xp, currency, flags, etc.).

followUpQuests.description: Quest ids to offer upon completion.

skills.name: quest.fail
skills.description: Mark a quest as failed.

skills.name: quest.list
skills.description: List quests for an entity (active, completed, failed, available), optionally filtered by status.

status.description: Filter by status. If omitted, returns all.

skills.name: quest.offer
skills.description: Offer a quest to a player entity. Quest appears in their quest log as available.

skills.name: quest.track
skills.description: Set a quest as tracked — shows its objectives on the HUD. Untracks all other quests for the entity.

skills.name: quest.update
skills.description: Update progress on a quest objective. Marks the objective complete at its required count and auto-completes the quest when all objectives are satisfied (stamping completedTick from the current tick). Surfaces rewards/follow-up quests when the quest completes.

skills.name: render.enablePost
skills.description: Build the RENDER-ONLY post-processing pipeline (real depth+normal pre-pass → GTAO contact AO → highlight bloom → gentle HDR grade) on the live renderer/scene/camera and store it on world.post for the render loop to drive (post.render() in place of renderer.render). Returns the resolved preset + which stages are wired. STATIC/CINEMATIC-ONLY + OPT-IN: on this WebGPU windowed backend the composite does not reliably present a fresh frame per camera move, so use it for screenshots/fixed-camera shots (drive the bare renderer.render path for live navigation). Render-only: never touches the sim/log/replay.

skills.name: save.export
skills.description: Export the current world as a save file into a named slot. LOG-FACADE mode (when a recorder is wired): serializes the recorded command stream into a portable export package (the durable world log). SNAPSHOT mode (default): serializes the real world snapshot (entity transforms + identity + gameState). Deterministic — derives its timestamp from the tick, so two exports at the same tick over the same state are byte-identical.

gameState.description: Serializable game-layer state to embed in the save.

skills.name: save.import
skills.description: Import a save file and reconstruct world state. SNAPSHOT saves are restored directly into the world (entity identity + transforms + gameState). LOG saves are loadExport-verified (content hashes) and, when replay factories are wired, replayed into a fresh world via the engine's replayCommands harness; otherwise the verified command count is surfaced for the caller to replay.

data.description: Serialized save data (a SnapshotSave or LogSave JSON wrapper).

skills.name: save.slot
skills.description: Manage named save slots (persistent across sessions): create/load/delete/list slots holding the real serialized save data produced by save.export.

data.description: Serialized save data (for the create action).

skills.name: scene.createEntity
skills.description: Create a renderable entity (box or sphere) at a position, optionally with a dynamic physics body. The `material` field accepts a palette name (optionally upgraded to procedural-PBR via `pbr: true`) or an imported texture-pack material name (material.import). Returns its entity id.

skills.name: scene.destroyEntity
skills.description: Destroy an entity and free its scene object and physics body.

skills.name: scene.queryEntities
skills.description: List entities, optionally filtered by tag and/or within a radius of a point. Returns ids, positions, distances.

skills.name: skills.browse
skills.description: Browse the AUTHORIZED skills in a specific category — progressive discovery of a large catalog.

category.description: Skill category to browse (player, camera, animation, interaction, inventory, game, trigger, event, quest, stats, damage, status, combat, behavior, dialogue, nav, vfx, save, progression, scene, ecs, three, physics, agent, system, ui, social, audio, terrain, world).

skills.name: skills.describe
skills.description: Describe a skill: version, category, and JSON-Schema input.

skills.name: skills.list
skills.description: List the skills the caller is authorized to invoke (names + descriptions). `mode:"bootstrap"` returns only the small CORE surface an agent starts with (discover the rest via skills.search/browse); `mode:"full"` (default) lists everything authorized.

mode.description: bootstrap = core tools only; full = all authorized (default).

skills.name: skills.search
skills.description: Search the AUTHORIZED skills by name/description (+ optional category) — browse a large catalog instead of listing everything.

skills.name: social.approach
skills.description: Walk the calling agent toward a target (an agent id, an entity id, or a world point). Sets the move target the locomotion system pursues; emits social.approached.

skills.name: social.say
skills.description: Speak a line as the calling agent: emits social.said (actorId = the host-bound caller) and shows a real speech bubble anchored above the speaker's humanoid (per-speaker queue).

skills.name: stats.create
skills.description: Create a stat block on an entity with named stats (HP, stamina, mana, strength, defense, etc.). Each stat has a value, max, and min.

config.description: Custom stat configuration (regen rate, display name, etc.).

stats.description: Stats to create (hp, mana, stamina, strength, defense, etc.).

skills.name: stats.get
skills.description: Get the current value, max, and min of a stat on an entity.

skills.name: stats.modify
skills.description: Modify a stat (add, subtract). Clamps to min/max by default. Fires the stat's onZero action if the change drops it to zero.

clamp.description: Whether to clamp to min/max (default true).

skills.name: stats.onZero
skills.description: Attach a data-driven action to execute when a stat reaches zero (death, depletion, etc.). Stored on the stat block and fired (as stats.onZero.fired) when damage/modify drops the stat to zero.

action.description: Action to execute when stat reaches zero (typically: death, depletion).

skills.name: status.apply
skills.description: Apply a status effect to an entity (poison, stun, slow, buff, shield, etc.) with duration and magnitude.

magnitude.description: Effect magnitude (damage per tick, slow percentage, etc.).

tickInterval.description: Tick interval in ms (for periodic effects like poison).

config.description: Custom status effect data (agent-defined behavior parameters).

skills.name: status.list
skills.description: List active status effects on an entity.

skills.name: status.remove
skills.description: Remove a status effect from an entity by effect id.

skills.name: terrain.sampleClimate
skills.description: Deterministic per-coordinate climate (tempC, precipMm, biome) for agent perception. Pass the region's terrain hints to read the per-type biome.

skills.name: terrain.sampleHeight
skills.description: O(1) deterministic surface-elevation query at a world (x,z) for a seed/lod (snapping/placement). Returns world Y.

skills.name: three.loadGLTF
skills.description: Load a glTF/glb model from a sandboxed asset id and add it to the scene at a position.

skills.name: three.setLighting
skills.description: Set scene lighting: one ambient + one directional light, optionally casting real shadow maps.

skills.name: three.setMaterial
skills.description: Update an entity's PBR material (color, roughness, metalness) and/or shadow participation (castShadow/receiveShadow), across all meshes of a glTF entity. `material` accepts a palette name (optionally procedural-PBR via `pbr: true`) or an imported texture-pack material name (material.import); a PBR/imported material REPLACES the mesh material.

skills.name: three.setTransform
skills.description: Set an entity's position, rotation (Euler radians), and/or scale.

skills.name: trace.explainEvent
skills.description: Explain a trace event with resolved causal parents and children.

skills.name: trace.export
skills.description: Flush the durable trace history to a sandboxed trace JSONL file.

skills.name: trace.tail
skills.description: Tail trace events with cursor pagination and optional actor/type filters.

skills.name: trigger.create
skills.description: Create a trigger zone (box or sphere) at a position with configurable size. Returns the trigger id for attaching phase actions (onEnter/onExit/onStay).

size.description: Box half-extents or sphere radius (radius = size[0] for sphere).

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: trigger.onEnter
skills.description: Attach a data-driven action descriptor to fire when an entity ENTERS a trigger zone. The descriptor (emit/setState/spawn/destroy/audio/animation/custom) is the agent-authored WHAT; the trigger pump returns it for the host to drive — it is not executed here.

data.description: Action-specific data (event name, spawn params, audio params, etc.).

action.description: Data-driven action descriptor (the agent-authored WHAT) fired by the trigger pump on this phase.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: trigger.onExit
skills.description: Attach an action descriptor to fire when an entity EXITS a trigger zone (returned by the trigger pump for the host to drive).

data.description: Action-specific data (event name, spawn params, audio params, etc.).

action.description: Data-driven action descriptor (the agent-authored WHAT) fired by the trigger pump on this phase.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: trigger.onStay
skills.description: Attach an action descriptor to fire each tick an entity STAYS inside a trigger zone (returned by the trigger pump for the host to drive).

data.description: Action-specific data (event name, spawn params, audio params, etc.).

action.description: Data-driven action descriptor (the agent-authored WHAT) fired by the trigger pump on this phase.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: trigger.remove
skills.description: Remove a trigger zone and all its attached phase actions.

meta.description: Agent-supplied extension data (custom action definitions, parameters, etc.).

skills.name: ui.callout
skills.description: Place an annotation box with a leader line to a target point.

skills.name: ui.hudPanel
skills.description: Place a screen-anchored HUD/overlay panel (corner-pinned, DPI-aware, over the scene).

skills.name: ui.label
skills.description: Place a billboard label (minimal chrome) tracking an entity or world point.

skills.name: ui.panel
skills.description: Author a styled UI container (kind = label/textBox/speechBubble/thoughtBubble/callout/hudPanel) with a full Zod style object, world/screen anchor, optional tail/leader and lifecycle (fade/typewriter/ttl/queue/feed). Returns an opaque handle.

skills.name: ui.remove
skills.description: Remove a live container by handle: detach its mesh from the scene and dispose its GPU resources.

skills.name: ui.speechBubble
skills.description: Place a speech bubble with a directional tail aimed at the speaker (entity/point).

skills.name: ui.textBox
skills.description: Place a titled text box (header bar + wrapped body) at a world or screen anchor.

skills.name: ui.thoughtBubble
skills.description: Place a thought bubble with trailing puffs leading back to the thinker.

skills.name: ui.update
skills.description: Update a live container by handle: change its text, title, body lines, and/or restyle it (re-composites). Returns whether the handle existed and re-composited.

skills.name: vfx.atPosition
skills.description: Spawn a one-shot particle burst at a world position (explosion, spark, puff, etc.). Spawns REAL particles immediately; the system self-frees once they drain.

config.description: Custom one-shot effect data (trail, explosion, sparkle, etc.).

skills.name: vfx.attach
skills.description: Attach a particle system to an entity. The emitter follows the entity's transform each update (trail, aura, weapon effect), offset by `offset`.

skills.name: vfx.create
skills.description: Create a CPU particle system with full configuration (emitter, lifetime, color, size, velocity, gravity, shape, blend mode). Builds a THREE.Points object on the scene; particles are simulated by the per-frame VFX update. Returns vfx id.

config.description: Custom particle system data (texture, noise, turbulence, etc.).

skills.name: vfx.destroy
skills.description: Destroy a particle system: remove its THREE.Points from the scene and free its geometry/material.

skills.name: vfx.play
skills.description: Start emitting particles from a particle system.

skills.name: vfx.stop
skills.description: Stop emitting; existing particles age out (a natural fade) instead of vanishing.

skills.name: world.addWater
skills.description: Add a RENDER-ONLY water surface (a large plane) at a sea-level Y so beaches/lakes/oceans read as water. Cosmetic only: no physics body, no collider, no ECS entity — it never affects the deterministic sim or replay. The world log records the REQUEST (level/size/color, and an optional region for true depth-aware shading); replay rebuilds the same surface from the logged request.

skills.name: world.generateRegion
skills.description: Generate a rectangular region of terrain: build the heightfield COLLIDERS from a deterministic source AND (by default) the VISIBLE procedural-PBR terrain mesh per tile, so the region renders a textured landscape out of the box. High-cost; streams tiles, emitting terrain.tile.ready per tile. Returns a region handle + the surveyed relief/seaLevel. The world log records this REQUEST; the tile bytes ride the cache/export; the visible meshes are RENDER-ONLY (rebuilt from the same tiles on replay). Opt out of the mesh with render:false (colliders/data only); tune the look with `surface`.

skills.name: world.getSpawn
skills.description: Get the default spawn position for players.

skills.name: world.populateBiome
skills.description: Scatter a terrain TYPE's biome content (trees/rocks/grass/cacti/palms, biome- and elevation-gated) over an ALREADY-GENERATED region (by regionId), via the deterministic asset.scatter seam. Surveys the region's relief with the hints it was generated with, resolves the type's content layers, and drives asset.scatter per layer. Deterministic + replay-safe: the world log records THIS request; the nested asset.scatter calls are recomputed on replay (no double-record). Returns the placement count + per-layer summary.

skills.name: world.setSpawn
skills.description: Set the default spawn position for players.

skills.name: world.setTime
skills.description: Set the world's time of day. Affects lighting, skybox, and ambient audio.

transitionMs.description: Smooth transition duration in ms (0 = instant).

skills.name: world.setTimeScale
skills.description: Set the simulation time scale. 0 pauses the world, 1 is normal speed.

scale.description: Simulation time scale (0 = pause, 1 = normal, 2 = double speed, etc.).

skills.name: world.setWeather
skills.description: Set the active weather with intensity. Supports clear, rain, snow, fog, storm, or custom types.

config.description: Custom weather data (particle params, audio, visibility, etc.).

skills.name: world.streamFollow
skills.description: Stream terrain tiles in a square window around an anchor (agent/camera): generate+apply tiles entering the window, remove tiles leaving a keep-margin. Returns the loaded/removed tile keys. Off-loop in production; synchronous here.
